title: callista moniliformis
intro: Callista moniliformis, also known as the cluster coral, is a species of sea snail and a type of marine mollusk, however I couldn't find any information about a plant with this name. Instead I found Callista lyrata, Callista moniliformis is an alternative name for it, however I couldn't find much information on this name either, I suspect it is a misspelling. Callista lyrata is a species of sea snail.
